title: Trump threatens to ‘obliterate’ Iran’s power plants if Strait of Hormuz does not open
summary_full: The IAEA is looking into Iran’s report that its Natanz nuclear site was hit in strikes. Human rights groups say they fear Iran will carry out mass executions.
summary_public: The IAEA is looking into Iran’s report that its Natanz nuclear site was hit in strikes. Human rights groups say they fear Iran will carry out mass executions.
